title: I Walk the Line
why_this_song: I Walk the Line by Johnny Cash (1956) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 8 times; first heard in: "I keep a close watch on this heart of mine"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "I keep a close watch on this heart of mine"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "Because you're mine, I walk the line"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "Because you're mine, I walk the line"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "Because you're mine, I walk the line"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Because you're mine, I walk the line
I find it very, very easy to be true
I find myself alone when each day is through
Yes, I'll admit that I'm a fool for you
Because you're mine, I walk the line
You've got a way to keep me on your side
You give me cause for love that I can't hide
For you I know I'd even try to turn the tide

exercises.prompt_en: Put the words in the right order:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque as palavras na ordem certa:

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "keep" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "keep" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "mine" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "mine" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "I Walk the Line" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "I Walk the Line" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "I Walk the Line", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "I Walk the Line", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "I Walk the Line" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "I Walk the Line" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
